# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2018-05-01/subscriptionDeploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
metadata:
  description: >
    Role assignments for CI/CD pipeline Service Principal.
    NOTE: The Service Principal must be created separately via Azure CLI, 
    PowerShell, or Terraform (not ARM). Assignments are scoped to specific
    resource groups following least-privilege principles.

parameters:
  servicePrincipalObjectId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: The Object ID (not App ID) of the pre-existing Service Principal for the CI/CD pipeline.

  targetResourceGroups:
    type: array
    metadata:
      description: List of resource group names the pipeline is allowed to deploy into.
    defaultValue:
      - rg-app-dev
      - rg-app-staging

  contributorRoleDefinitionId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c
    metadata:
      description: Built-in Contributor role definition GUID.

resources:
  # Create the target resource groups if they don't exist
  - type: Microsoft.Resources/resourceGroups
    apiVersion: "2022-09-01"
    copy:
      name: resourceGroupCopy
      count: "[length(parameters('targetResourceGroups'))]"
    name: "[parameters('targetResourceGroups')[copyIndex()]]"
    location: "[deployment().location]"
    tags:
      managedBy: ci-cd-pipeline

  # Grant Contributor scoped to each specific resource group (NOT subscription-wide)
  - type: Microsoft.Resources/deployments
    apiVersion: "2022-09-01"
    copy:
      name: roleAssignmentCopy
      count: "[length(parameters('targetResourceGroups'))]"
    name: "[concat('roleAssignment-', parameters('targetResourceGroups')[copyIndex()])]"
    resourceGroup: "[parameters('targetResourceGroups')[copyIndex()]]"
    dependsOn:
      - resourceGroupCopy
    properties:
      mode: Incremental
      template:
        $schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
        contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
        resources:
          - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
            apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
            name: "[guid(subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('targetResourceGroups')[copyIndex()], parameters('servicePrincipalObjectId'), parameters('contributorRoleDefinitionId'))]"
            properties:
              roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', parameters('contributorRoleDefinitionId'))]"
              principalId: "[parameters('servicePrincipalObjectId')]"
              principalType: ServicePrincipal
              description: "[concat('CI/CD pipeline Contributor access scoped to ', parameters('targetResourceGroups')[copyIndex()])]"

outputs:
  roleAssignmentResourceGroups:
    type: array
    value: "[parameters('targetResourceGroups')]"
  securityNote:
    type: string
    value: >
      Contributor role has been assigned at the resource group level only,
      not at subscription scope. If additional resource groups are needed,
      add them to the targetResourceGroups parameter and redeploy.
